title: neomammillaria oliviae
intro: Neomammillaria oliviae, also known as the Olivia's pincushion or Pincushion Cactus, is a species of cactus in the genus Neomammillaria. This plant is a succulent that produces clusters of small, round stems with fine spines and produces white to pale yellow flowers. Neomammillaria oliviae has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and treat digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment to be used for various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting digestive health.
